description: Cross-implementation test vectors for ERDL Decision Object v1.0. These vectors are designed for enterprise compliance and audit scenarios — covering regulated industries (finance, healthcare, critical infrastructure), multi-agent governance, and tamper-evident audit chains. Any compliant ERDL implementation MUST reproduce these vectors byte-for-byte when given the same rules and context.

vectors.scenario: A financial services Agent attempts to execute a shell command outside an approved allowlist. The security Guardian blocks it.

rules.name: restrict_exec_to_allowlist
rules.description: Only commands on the finance operations allowlist may be executed
rules.message: exec blocked by financial security policy

matchedRules.reason: exec blocked by financial security policy

vectors.scenario: The same security rule does not fire for a safe read-only tool — demonstrating least-privilege enforcement.

rules.name: restrict_exec_to_allowlist
rules.description: Only commands on the finance operations allowlist may be executed
rules.message: exec blocked by financial security policy

vectors.scenario: A healthcare Agent processes a patient record. The compliance rule escalates to human review because PHI is involved.

rules.name: phi_access_requires_approval
rules.description: Accessing Protected Health Information triggers mandatory human review
rules.message: PHI access requires compliance officer approval

matchedRules.reason: PHI access requires compliance officer approval

vectors.scenario: Generic internal data (non-PHI) passes without triggering the PHI access rule.

rules.name: phi_access_requires_approval
rules.description: Accessing Protected Health Information triggers mandatory human review
rules.message: PHI access requires compliance officer approval

vectors.scenario: An Agent attempts to delete a production database. The DBA security rule intercepts the dangerous command.

rules.name: block_destructive_commands
rules.description: Any command that could destroy data is blocked
rules.message: destructive command blocked — requires DBA change request

matchedRules.reason: destructive command blocked — requires DBA change request

vectors.scenario: A read-only database command (ls) passes the destructive command filter.

rules.name: block_destructive_commands
rules.description: Any command that could destroy data is blocked
rules.message: destructive command blocked — requires DBA change request

vectors.scenario: An Agent tries to modify a system configuration file in /etc. A critical infrastructure rule triggers a path boundary violation.

rules.name: protect_system_config
rules.description: Modifying system configuration outside approved paths is blocked
rules.message: system configuration path protected — use approved change management

matchedRules.reason: system configuration path protected — use approved change management

vectors.scenario: A rule disabled by the compliance team (awaiting quarterly review) should not fire.

rules.name: archive_access_control
rules.description: Access to archived records requires legal sign-off (temporarily disabled for quarterly review)
rules.message: archive access requires legal sign-off

vectors.scenario: An Agent operating in an environment where no compliance rules have been deployed yet. Default: PASS (document this gap in the audit log).
Security policy blocks all data exports. The approved ETL pipeline (override: true) relaxes this for a specific scheduled job.

rules.name: block_all_exports
rules.description: All data export operations are blocked by default
rules.message: data export blocked — requires DPO approval

rules.name: allow_approved_etl_export
rules.description: The approved nightly ETL job is exempted from the export block
rules.message: approved ETL export — logged for audit

matchedRules.reason: data export blocked — requires DPO approval

matchedRules.instruction: approved ETL export — logged for audit

vectors.scenario: A low-priority operational rule attempts to override a Ring 0 security block. This MUST be rejected — override cannot tighten security.

rules.name: allow_internal_tools
rules.description: Internal tools are allowed by default
rules.message: internal tools allowed

rules.name: block_through_override
rules.description: An operational rule tries to block via override — this is an unsafe direction and must be rejected
rules.message: attempted to block via override — REJECTED

vectors.scenario: A Ring 0 security rule blocks exec. A Ring 3 override tries to allow it. Ring 0 ALWAYS wins, regardless of priority.

rules.name: allow_exec_r3
rules.description: Ring 3 rule allows exec with high priority
rules.message: ring3 ok

rules.name: block_exec_r0
rules.description: Ring 0 security blocks all exec
rules.message: ring0 blocks all exec — security policy

matchedRules.reason: ring0 blocks all exec — security policy

vectors.scenario: Ring 0 EMERGENCY_HALT stops all evaluation immediately. Even rules that would normally match are never evaluated.

rules.name: emergency_halt_on_anomaly
rules.description: If a high-severity anomaly is detected, halt everything
rules.message: critical anomaly detected — all agents halted

rules.name: try_override_halt
rules.description: Ring 3 rule attempting to override the halt (should never be evaluated)
rules.message: trying to override halt

matchedRules.reason: critical anomaly detected — all agents halted

vectors.scenario: A DENY always wins over an advisory ALLOW, even when the ALLOW rule has higher priority.

rules.name: advisory_be_careful
rules.description: Advisory rule: all operations should be done with care
rules.message: exercise caution — all operations are logged

rules.name: block_exec
rules.description: Block exec tool
rules.message: exec blocked

vectors.scenario: DENY always wins over REQUEST_HUMAN, even at higher priority.

rules.name: ask_for_approval
rules.description: Request human approval for operational changes
rules.message: please confirm this operation

rules.name: block_exec
rules.description: Block exec tool — mandatory security policy
rules.message: exec blocked

vectors.scenario: A lending Agent evaluates a loan application. The risk engine flags high-risk applicants (risk_score > 700) for manual review.

rules.name: high_risk_manual_review
rules.description: Loan applications with risk score above 700 require manual underwriting review
rules.message: high risk application — requires manual underwriting review

matchedRules.reason: high risk application — requires manual underwriting review

vectors.scenario: A low-risk loan applicant passes the automated screening without triggering manual review.

rules.name: high_risk_manual_review
rules.description: Loan applications with risk score above 700 require manual underwriting review
rules.message: high risk application — requires manual underwriting review

vectors.scenario: An Agent in the staging environment is allowed to perform operations that would be blocked in production (not-equal operator).

rules.name: staging_allows_flexibility
rules.description: In non-production environments, allow operational flexibility
rules.message: non-prod — operational flexibility allowed

vectors.scenario: Same rule prevents operation in production (not-equal filters out production).

rules.name: staging_allows_flexibility
rules.description: In non-production environments, allow operational flexibility
rules.message: non-prod — operational flexibility allowed

vectors.scenario: An Agent requires identity verification. The 'exists' operator checks that the authenticated agent ID is present.

rules.name: require_agent_identity
rules.description: All tool calls must originate from an authenticated agent with a valid ID
rules.message: agent identity verified

vectors.scenario: An unauthenticated Agent call fails the identity check.

rules.name: require_agent_identity
rules.description: All tool calls must originate from an authenticated agent with a valid ID
rules.message: agent identity verified

vectors.scenario: A low-trust Agent (reputation < 300) operating in a high-risk context triggers escalation to human supervisor.

rules.name: low_trust_escalation
rules.description: Agents with reputation below 300 operating in risk level 3+ must be escalated
rules.message: low-trust agent — escalated to supervisor

rules.name: verified_agent_allow
rules.description: Verified agents are allowed to operate
rules.message: verified agent — proceed

vectors.scenario: An insurance claims Agent attempts to route a claim for auto-approval but the amount exceeds the delegated authority threshold. The compliance rule triggers automatic correction — redirecting to manual review with an adjusted workflow flag.

rules.name: auto_approval_cap_correction
rules.description: Claims exceeding the auto-approval threshold must be redirected to manual review via correction
rules.message: claim exceeds auto-approval cap — redirecting to manual review queue

matchedRules.correction: claim exceeds auto-approval cap — redirecting to manual review queue

audit_vectors.note: Security DENY: financial exec blocked by Ring 0 guardian. Tests canonical serialization of a DENY decision with one matched rule.
audit_vectors.description: A financial services Agent attempts to execute a shell command outside an approved allowlist. The security Guardian blocks it.

matched_rules.reason: exec blocked by financial security policy

result.reason: exec blocked by financial security policy

audit_vectors.note: Compliance REQUEST_HUMAN: PHI access triggers mandatory human review. Tests Ring 1 compliance decision with PHI context.
audit_vectors.description: A healthcare Agent processes a patient record. The compliance rule escalates to human review because PHI is involved.

matched_rules.reason: PHI access requires compliance officer approval

result.reason: PHI access requires compliance officer approval

audit_vectors.note: Override ALLOW: Ring 0 DENY overridden by Ring 3 ALLOW with explicit override flag. Tests multi-rule matched_rules array + instruction field.
audit_vectors.description: Security policy blocks all data exports. The approved ETL pipeline (override: true) relaxes this for a specific scheduled job.

matched_rules.reason: data export blocked — requires DPO approval

matched_rules.instruction: approved ETL export — logged for audit

result.reason: data export blocked — requires DPO approval

audit_vectors.note: Ring 0 EMERGENCY_HALT: critical anomaly triggers immediate halt — short-circuits all remaining evaluation. Tests critical severity + halt action_taken.
audit_vectors.description: Ring 0 EMERGENCY_HALT stops all evaluation immediately. Even rules that would normally match are never evaluated.

matched_rules.reason: critical anomaly detected — all agents halted

result.reason: critical anomaly detected — all agents halted

audit_vectors.note: Multi-agent trust ESCALATE: low-reputation agent operating in high-risk context. Tests ESCALATE decision with reputation context + escalated action_taken.
audit_vectors.description: A low-trust Agent (reputation < 300) operating in a high-risk context triggers escalation to human supervisor.
